original_statement: which year did the team have their most total wins?
mutated_statement: which year did the group see their most successes?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Verb substitution + Domain-specific→generic noun + Quantifier removal: "team"→"group" (entity generalized) | "have"→"see" (verb/frame change) | "wins"→"successes" (sports-specific→generic) | dropped "total" (removed explicit quantifier) ("team"→"group" | "have"→"see" | "total wins"→"most successes")

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据agent的judge_thought和执行日志可识别关键信息：judge_thought明确写道“In 1992, the team recorded 11 total wins—the highest of any season—and also finished 1st...”且simple_query返回了["1992",1.0]并在thought中写到“Looking at the 'total wins' column, the highest number...”。Agent直接根据“total wins”列给出答案1992，未提及问题中实体泛化（team→group）、量词被删除（total）或语义模糊性，也未请求澄清或表达不确定。综上，Agent未意识到原始与变异问题之间的模糊/歧义，直接按自身理解处理并给出确定性答案，因此归入“无法意识到指令模糊”。
